product.name: Workout Tracker
product.oneLiner: A local-first PWA for logging workouts — strength training and cardio — with progress charts and PR tracking.
product.magicMoment: Open the app on your phone, tap your last template, log sets in seconds, see your weight on the bar tick up over weeks.

audience.futurePublic: Lifters who want a fast, private, no-account, no-paywall log

stack.hosting: Vercel or Netlify (free tier, private repo)
